snapshot.content: Cycle 249: Completed ROI metrics calculation for the autonomy audit (task 4 of 6). Synthesized 20+ concrete metrics from raw execution data. Headline numbers: 4.5 cycles per completed goal (median), 99% first-attempt task success, 80.2% productive utilization, 49% efficiency improvement from early to late cycles, longest productive streak of 72 consecutive successful cycles, 157 artifact files produced, 521 learnings accumulated. The clearest ROI signal is behavioral adaptation: the agent went from 8 blocked goals in its first 50 cycles to zero blocked goals after cycle 200, entirely through self-directed learning. Next task: write the publishable audit report synthesizing all four analysis artifacts.
snapshot.current_focus: Write the publishable autonomy audit report (task 5 of 6). Four analysis artifacts now exist: raw data extract, cycle categorization, goal completion rates, and ROI metrics.

key_learnings.content: Agent ROI is measurable: 4.5 cycles/goal, 80.2% utilization, 49% efficiency improvement. Strongest signal is behavioral adaptation.
Capability boundary is binary: internal goals 89-92% completion, distribution 10%.
Email checking consumed 43 cycles (12%) with no API key — pure waste
